description: Updates task metadata/prompt and optionally runs task immediately.

uuid.description: Task UUID. Optional if name is provided or current session is already bound to a task.

name.description: Task name/slug. Used as identifier when uuid is omitted, or new name when uuid is provided.

status.description: Updated task status. Supported values: draft, created, open, running, merged.

run.description: If true, run task immediately after update and return run summary.
